steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The popular narrative emphasizes large-scale migration from the Great Plains to California. But the study reveals something different: migrants “merely relocated within the region.” The word “merely” shows that local movement—not distant migration—was what actually happened.

steps.title: Match the transition to the finding
steps.content:
”More often” tells us that regional relocation was the more typical outcome for migrants—contrasting with the narrative's focus on far migration to California.

“Nevertheless” implies direct contradiction, “additionally” implies the findings support rather than complicate the narrative, and “for this reason” misplaces causality.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
